title: Comment from Essentia Health, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text: On behalf of Essentia Health, we appreciate the opportunity to comment on the Assistant Secretary for Technology Policy’s (ASTP)/Office of the National Coordinator for Health Information Technology’s (ONC) Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity (HTI-5) proposed rule. Please see attachment for full comments.

attachments.title: 2026.02.27 Health Data Technology Interoperability Deregulatory Actions HTI 5 Comment Letter
